title: AgentTaskManifest
description: Required manifest for medium and high-risk agent tasks. No manifest = no dispatch. Created by the Orchestrator before delegating work. Generic, product-agnostic.

taskId.description: ULID primary key for this task.

taskDescription.description: Plain-English description of what needs to be done.

domains.description: Domains this task touches. Implementations may constrain to a project-specific enum. Used for pre-task failure retrieval and trust score lookup.

riskLevel.description: Risk classification. Medium and above require this manifest. High triggers mandatory QA. Critical triggers escalated review.

interfacesTouched.description: File paths, API endpoints, or schemas that will be modified.

contractsReferenced.description: Contract file paths that govern this task's domain. Orchestrator verifies these exist.

verificationRequired.description: What verification is required before this task can be marked complete.

blockingDependencies.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task can start.

preventionCheck.description: The specific prevention check to apply during this task.

priorFailureContext.description: FailureRecords surfaced by pre-task retrieval. Injected into the agent brief.

evalPlan.description: Required for medium- and high-risk tasks. How will the result be evaluated?

assignedAgent.description: Generic agent role assigned to execute this task. Implementations may extend this enum.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the manifest was created.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was completed. Null while in progress.

result.description: Final result after QA verdict. Null while in progress.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID for event tracing across the audit log.
